engineConfig.graphqlSchema:
schema {
  query: Query
  subscription: Subscription
}

directive @tag(name: String!) repeatable on ARGUMENT_DEFINITION | ENUM | ENUM_VALUE | FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_OBJECT | INTERFACE | OBJECT | SCALAR | UNION

directive @inaccessible on ARGUMENT_DEFINITION | ENUM | ENUM_VALUE | FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_OBJECT | INTERFACE | OBJECT | SCALAR | UNION

directive @requiresScopes(scopes: [[openfed__Scope!]!]!) on ENUM | FIELD_DEFINITION | INTERFACE | OBJECT | SCALAR

scalar openfed__Scope

type Query {
  user(id: ID!): User
  users: [User!]!
  organization(id: ID!): Organization
  node(id: ID!): Node
  article(id: ID!): Article
  articleBySlug(slug: String!, locale: String!): Article
  articles: [Article!]!
  podcast(id: ID!): Podcast
  search(term: String!): [SearchResult!]!
  featuredArticle: Article
  firstArticle: Article @tag(name: "internal") @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:articles"]])
  asset(id: ID!): Asset
}

interface Node {
  id: ID!
}

type Organization {
  id: ID!
  name: String!
  memberCount: Int!
  subscription: Subscription
  invoices: [Invoice!]!
}

interface Publishable {
  id: ID!
  title: String!
  publishedAt: String!
}

interface ContentItem {
  id: ID!
  stats: ContentStats!
}

union SearchResult = Article | Podcast

type Review {
  id: ID!
  rating: Int!
  body: String!
  author: User!
  article: Article!
  readingTimeAdjusted: Int!
}

type ContentStats @tag(name: "analytics") {
  views: Int!
  shares: Int!
  avgReadSeconds: Float!
}

interface Asset {
  id: ID!
  url: String!
}

type MediaAsset {
  id: ID!
  storageKey: String! @inaccessible
}

type Subscription @tag(name: "billing") {
  id: ID!
  orgId: ID!
  planId: ID!
  status: String!
  internalLedgerRef: String! @inaccessible
  seatUtilization: Float!
  org: Organization!
}

type Invoice {
  id: ID!
  amountCents: Int!
  paid: Boolean!
}

type User implements Node @tag(name: "pii") {
  id: ID!
  username: String!
  displayName: String!
  email: String!
  internalAuthToken: String! @inaccessible
  organization: Organization
  reviews: [Review!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:reviews"]])
  recommendedArticles: [Article!]!
}

type Article implements Publishable & ContentItem {
  id: ID!
  slug: String!
  locale: String!
  title: String!
  body: String!
  wordCount: Int!
  publishedAt: String!
  heroImageUrl: String!
  author: User!
  reviews: [Review!]!
  relatedContent: [Publishable!]!
  stats: ContentStats!
}

type Podcast implements Publishable & ContentItem {
  id: ID!
  title: String!
  publishedAt: String!
  durationSeconds: Int!
  host: User!
  reviews: [Review!]!
  stats: ContentStats!
}

type ImageAsset implements Asset {
  id: ID!
  url: String!
  width: Int!
  height: Int!
}

type VideoAsset implements Asset {
  id: ID!
  url: String!
  durationSeconds: Int!
  transcodeProgress: Float!
}

stringStorage.fb31d1ae891f256a0042ee09d0332f4aefb1c3f7:
schema {
  query: Query
}

directive @external on FIELD_DEFINITION | OBJECT

directive @key(fields: openfed__FieldSet!, resolvable: Boolean = true) repeatable on INTERFACE | OBJECT

directive @link(as: String, for: link__Purpose, import: [link__Import], url: String!) repeatable on SCHEMA

directive @provides(fields: openfed__FieldSet!) on FIELD_DEFINITION

directive @requiresScopes(scopes: [[openfed__Scope!]!]!) on ENUM | FIELD_DEFINITION | INTERFACE | OBJECT | SCALAR

directive @shareable repeatable on FIELD_DEFINITION | OBJECT

directive @tag(name: String!) repeatable on ARGUMENT_DEFINITION | ENUM | ENUM_VALUE | FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_OBJECT | INTERFACE | OBJECT | SCALAR | UNION

type Article implements ContentItem & Publishable @key(fields: "id") @key(fields: "slug locale") {
  author: User!
  body: String!
  heroImageUrl: String!
  id: ID!
  locale: String!
  publishedAt: String!
  slug: String!
  title: String! @shareable
  wordCount: Int!
}

interface ContentItem @key(fields: "id") {
  id: ID!
}

type Podcast implements ContentItem & Publishable @key(fields: "id") {
  durationSeconds: Int!
  host: User!
  id: ID!
  publishedAt: String!
  title: String!
}

interface Publishable {
  id: ID!
  publishedAt: String!
  title: String!
}

type Query {
  article(id: ID!): Article
  articleBySlug(locale: String!, slug: String!): Article
  articles: [Article!]!
  featuredArticle: Article @provides(fields: "author { displayName }")
  firstArticle: Article @tag(name: "internal") @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:articles"]])
  podcast(id: ID!): Podcast
  search(term: String!): [SearchResult!]!
}

union SearchResult = Article | Podcast

type User @key(fields: "id") {
  displayName: String! @external
  id: ID!
}

scalar link__Import

enum link__Purpose {
  EXECUTION
  SECURITY
}

scalar openfed__FieldSet

scalar openfed__Scope
stringStorage.0c8e8c65c132487b015b917fa4e49661497610ab:
directive @external on FIELD_DEFINITION | OBJECT

directive @key(fields: openfed__FieldSet!, resolvable: Boolean = true) repeatable on INTERFACE | OBJECT

directive @link(as: String, for: link__Purpose, import: [link__Import], url: String!) repeatable on SCHEMA

directive @requires(fields: openfed__FieldSet!) on FIELD_DEFINITION

directive @requiresScopes(scopes: [[openfed__Scope!]!]!) on ENUM | FIELD_DEFINITION | INTERFACE | OBJECT | SCALAR

directive @shareable repeatable on FIELD_DEFINITION | OBJECT

type Article @key(fields: "id") {
  id: ID!
  reviews: [Review!]!
  wordCount: Int! @external
}

type Podcast @key(fields: "id") {
  id: ID!
  reviews: [Review!]!
}

type Review @key(fields: "id") {
  article: Article!
  author: User!
  body: String!
  id: ID!
  rating: Int!
  readingTimeAdjusted: Int! @requires(fields: "article { wordCount }")
}

type User @key(fields: "id") {
  displayName: String! @shareable
  id: ID!
  reviews: [Review!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:reviews"]])
}

scalar link__Import

enum link__Purpose {
  EXECUTION
  SECURITY
}

scalar openfed__FieldSet

scalar openfed__Scope
stringStorage.b8afb3ef49490216c7fe02530721341c7d52139d:
schema {
  subscription: Subscription
}

directive @external on FIELD_DEFINITION | OBJECT

directive @inaccessible on ARGUMENT_DEFINITION | ENUM | ENUM_VALUE | FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_OBJECT | INTERFACE | OBJECT | SCALAR | UNION

directive @key(fields: openfed__FieldSet!, resolvable: Boolean = true) repeatable on INTERFACE | OBJECT

directive @link(as: String, for: link__Purpose, import: [link__Import], url: String!) repeatable on SCHEMA

directive @requires(fields: openfed__FieldSet!) on FIELD_DEFINITION

directive @tag(name: String!) repeatable on ARGUMENT_DEFINITION | ENUM | ENUM_VALUE | FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION | INPUT_OBJECT | INTERFACE | OBJECT | SCALAR | UNION

type Invoice @key(fields: "id") {
  amountCents: Int!
  id: ID!
  paid: Boolean!
}

type Organization @key(fields: "id") {
  id: ID!
  invoices: [Invoice!]!
  memberCount: Int! @external
  subscription: Subscription
}

type Subscription @key(fields: "orgId planId") @key(fields: "id") @tag(name: "billing") {
  id: ID!
  internalLedgerRef: String! @inaccessible
  org: Organization!
  orgId: ID!
  planId: ID!
  seatUtilization: Float! @requires(fields: "org { memberCount }")
  status: String!
}

scalar link__Import

enum link__Purpose {
  EXECUTION
  SECURITY
}

scalar openfed__FieldSet

  organization(id: ID!): Organization
  node(id: ID!): Node
  article(id: ID!): Article
  articleBySlug(slug: String!, locale: String!): Article
  articles: [Article!]!
  podcast(id: ID!): Podcast

  featuredArticle: Article
  firstArticle: Article
  asset(id: ID!): Asset
}

  subscription: Subscription

  stats: ContentStats!
